fill_to_balance90_transfer_gap.expected_question_answered: Whether live/no-order fill-to-balance candidates are absent, blocked, already size-limited, immediately paired, or admitted into residual-heavy buckets.
limits: Prior fill-to-balance diagnostic shadows do not contain source-link transition diagnostics.
Events JSONL were intentionally not pulled and should not be pulled retroactively.
Same-window candidate_base/candidate_registry for 2026-05-20 is still absent.

portfolio_ledger_transfer_gap.expected_question_answered: Which admitted transitions make a condition ledger risk-adjusted negative, and whether they are concentrated enough for a deployable non-price rule.
limits: The exact portfolio-ledger diagnostic 3600s shadow lacks source-link transition diagnostics.
The prior positive-only condition proxy destroyed sample and remains non-deployable.

dynamic_condition_ledger_risk_state_gate.expected_question_answered: Whether risk-increasing seeds blocked by the local gate were actually future pairing-improving or residual-producing in no-order summaries.
limits: The current dynamic risk-state verifier is mixed and should not be rerun as-is.
Any refinement must avoid summary-only removal and retain most sample.

late_repair90_pair_tail_and_residual_tai.expected_question_answered: Whether tail-producing seeds are necessary repair transitions, source-link missing transitions, or a narrow offset/side bucket that can be handled without destroying sample.
limits: Source-public-price cap variants are frozen and should not be revived from this attribution alone.

selected_next_local_verifier.name: source_link_transition_bucket_scorer_smoke
selected_next_local_verifier.description: Implement a local no-network scorer that consumes future summary/aggregate JSON with event_lite.source_link_transition_diagnostics, validates aggregate parity, ranks transition buckets by sample retention, immediate pair contribution, residual cost contribution, and ledger-proxy movement, and refuses summary-only removal plans that destroy sample.
required_outputs: top admitted transition buckets by immediate pair qty/cost
top admitted transition buckets by residual qty/cost
blocked transition buckets by reason and risk direction
keep_criteria: The scorer runs locally on source-link diagnostic summary/aggregate shape with no prohibited data.
The scorer can identify bounded transition buckets without recommending summary-only removal.
The scorer names explicit thresholds for sample retention, residual cost share, and immediate-pair contribution before any future diagnostic shadow.
unknown_criteria: No real no-order source-link diagnostic summaries exist yet, and synthetic/smoke shape is insufficient to define scorer semantics.
Required source-link fields are absent from aggregate or per-summary output.
discard_criteria: The scorer can only recommend removing risk-negative summaries or conditions after the fact.
The scorer cannot connect admitted transitions to immediate pair and residual buckets.

diagnostic_shadow_policy.reason: Source-link diagnostics are instrumentation-ready, but instrumentation readiness is not a strategy KEEP and not promotion evidence.
future_minimum_conditions: a concrete diagnostic question is selected with explicit bucket criteria
bounded EC2 preflight finds no xuan-research overlap and no resource or no-order safety blocker
the run is diagnostic-only with PM_DRY_RUN=true, no fill-to-balance90 unless separately re-justified, no promotion/canary interpretation, and no events JSONL pullback
diagnostic_shadow_policy.heartbeat_cadence: Keep 30 minute cadence for this local verifier phase. If a bounded remote/no-order diagnostic shadow is later active or expected to finish within one hour, temporarily use 15 minute cadence and restore 30 minutes after completion, block, or discard.

research_ranking.label: KEEP_SOURCE_LINK_TRANSITION_ATTRIBUTION_PLAN_SELECTED
research_ranking.interpretation: The source-link diagnostics now have a concrete local scorer/verifier path and can explain prior transfer-gap families only in future summaries that include the new default-off fields. This is attribution-plan readiness, not economic strategy evidence.

next_executable_action: Implement and run a local no-network source_link_transition_bucket_scorer_smoke under scripts/ against source-link diagnostic summary/aggregate shape; do not SSH or start EC2 shadow/canary before that local scorer returns KEEP.
